text: Stepping into this space, I am enveloped by an aura of curiosity and anticipation. The interplay of glass, neon, and retro technology makes me feel as if I've crossed into a liminal zone—part museum, part futuristic playground. The bold R+D lettering and the words about connecting with intelligent machines provoke reflection: I feel both small in the face of humanity's technological ambition, and quietly thrilled to participate, even briefly, in its unfolding story.
